Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 1) Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 2) Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 3) Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 in cases where the reviewer eventually agrees
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 4) Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 5) Total resolution time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 measured as the duration until any subsequent reviewer response (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 6) Time elapsed between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer No Response in variants where no agreement follows the reminder
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 7) Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to the next occurrence of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2, indicating escalation due to non-response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 8) Minimum time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and Assign a Different Editor in variants where reviewer assignment fails
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 9) Average cycle time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when followed by SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 10) Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 in variants that require reviewer reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 11) Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1, highlighting delays in the invitation process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 12) Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in successful review paths where agreement is reached
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 13) Minimum time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-EIC Accept in cases where the manuscript is ultimately accepted after reviewer agreement
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 14) Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants involving major or minor revisions
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 15) Time elapsed between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and Unassign Reviewer in cases where the assigned reviewer is later removed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'
